summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Macrotides legal peptide sale website. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend UI functional with minor cart count visibility issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Cart count badge missing data-testid attribute for testing

integration_issues.issue: Cart state not persisted when navigating directly to /checkout URL (shows empty cart)

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/)
Get all products endpoint (/api/products) - 12 products loaded
Get categories endpoint (/api/categories) - 5 categories
Get product by ID endpoint (/api/products/{id})
Get products by category endpoint (/api/products/category/{category})
Create checkout session endpoint (/api/checkout/create-session)
Invalid product ID error handling (404)
Homepage loads with research disclaimer banner
Navigation links present (Products, Categories, About, FAQ)
Product grid displays 12 products with images, prices, purity badges
Category filter tabs work (6 categories including 'All')
Add to cart functionality works
Cart drawer opens and shows added items
Quantity controls work (increase/decrease)
Checkout button from cart drawer navigates to checkout
Checkout form loads when cart has items
Form validation works (6 error messages for empty required fields)
Checkout form submission with valid data
Stripe checkout session creation and redirect to Stripe hosted checkout
Order summary displays cart items and totals correctly
Research disclaimer and acknowledgment present

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor cart state persistence issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding localStorage persistence to cart state in CartContext.js to maintain cart contents when users navigate directly to checkout URL. Also add data-testid='cart-count' to cart count badge in Header.js for better testability.
